title: mentha aquatica var. pyrifolia
intro: Mentha aquatica var. pyrifolia, also known as peppermint water or round-leaved mint, is a variety of the water mint plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestive issues, alleviate headaches, and reduce inflammation due to its high content of menthol and menthone. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica var. pyrifolia include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve respiratory function, and provide relief from menstrual cramps, among others. Herbal preparations of Mentha aquatica var. pyrifolia include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
